mentions.note: Curt asked; Cramer loves but stock at 52-week high; reports next week; good company, great yield; don't push at peak—buy on dip after others sell.

Diversified Canadian pipeline operator; 30% N.A. crude, ~20% U.S. natural gas, continent's largest gas utility. 30% stake in West Coast LNG terminal (BC, 2027 entry)—fastest Asia route. Buy for pipelines and dividend; LNG is kicker.
Buy here and hope it goes lower; recommended in Cramer's book; for everyone (retirees and all); long-standing favorite.
